description_long: This object is a classic portable boombox radio receiver, featuring a rectangular body with a prominent black handle on top for easy carrying. The front face displays two large circular speaker grilles on either side, a central rectangular display area, and several control buttons and dials above the speakers. The casing is primarily a light gray color, with black accents on the handle, speaker grilles, and control elements. The back and sides are plain, with minimal detailing except for a few protruding knobs and structural seams. The overall design is reminiscent of 1980s and 1990s street radios, often seen in urban environments for music playback and radio listening.
description: A classic portable boombox radio receiver with a gray body, black handle, dual speakers, and front-facing controls. Its retro design features a central display and prominent speaker grilles.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual black speaker grilles, central display, and multiple control buttons and dials.
description_view_1: Left side view showing the boxy profile and the handle extending across the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain gray back with minimal features and the handle visible on top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a similar boxy profile with a few protruding knobs.
